title: Lead Instructional Designer at VIT University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at VIT University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
